name: toedscool
flavor_texts: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.
Though it looks like Tentacool, Toedscool is a completely different species. Its legs may be thin, but it can run at a speed of 30 mph.
text: Toedscool is the Woodear Pokémon. It is a ground and grass-type Pokémon. Abilities: mycelium-might. Base stats — HP: 40, Attack: 40, Defense: 35, Sp. Atk: 50, Sp. Def: 100, Speed: 70. Evolution line: toedscool → toedscruel. Lore: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious. Though it looks like Tentacool, Toedscool is a completely different species. Its legs may be thin, but it can run at a speed of 30 mph.
